request.sql: SELECT id, order_id, carrier, tracking_no, status, shipped_at FROM shipments WHERE #{orderId}

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_shipments_order ON public.shipments USING btree (order_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX shipments_pkey ON public.shipments USING btree (id)

request.templateSql:
SELECT <include refid="ShipmentHarnessColumns" />
        FROM shipments
        <where>
            <foreach collection="orderIds" item="orderId" open="order_id IN (" separator="," close=")">
                #{orderId}
            </foreach>
        </where>
